SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY GUY TRIGER--OWNER. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUMA POWER WASH, LLC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HARMON, EMILY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
